variants.title: HiFi Filter SAHB 0206H004 Clamp
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAHB 0206H004 Clamp. Easy to install and replace, the SAHB 0206H004 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: CLAMP, Dimension 1 (D1): 198.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 171.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 162.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 50.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 8.0 mm
